subject: enhance wait status for install APPC features
commit_message:
enhance wait status for install APPC features

sleep 120 sec was the logic, but it cannot
make sure karaf is ready within 120 seconds
use echo karaf command to make sure karaf is ready
instead

Issue-ID: APPC-1877
Change-Id: I07333ab430edaf8a7d83a50cdc874680921ea4c8
Signed-off-by: Taka Cho <takamune.cho@att.com>
[Use common secret template to store karaf creds]
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
